title: AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 Out

detail.title: AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 Out
detail.short_info: The officials of AP have released the AP Time Table 2026 for SSC Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

sections.heading: AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 Out

content.text: Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh has officially released the AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 for Secondary School Certificate Advanced Supplementary Examinations, May 2026. The exams are scheduled for both Academic and OSSC candidates. Students can now check the complete schedule and download the official AP SSC Time Table 2026 PDF from the board website.
Direct Link to Download AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 Here

sections.heading: AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 Overview

rows: Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh (BSEAP)

sections.heading: AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 has been released for all major subjects. Below is the complete subject-wise schedule for Advanced Supplementary Examinations May 2026.

rows: First Language Paper-II (Composite) / OSSC Main Language Paper-I

sections.heading: How to Download AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 by following the steps below:

items: Visit the official website of Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh.
Go to the Examinations or Time Table section.
Look for the link for SSC Advanced Supplementary Examinations May 2026 Time Table.
Click on the PDF link to open the timetable.
Download and save the file on your device.
Take a printout and keep it for exam preparation.

content.text: Note: Always refer to the official timetable and check all dates and timings carefully before the examinations.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026

content.text: The official AP SSC Public Exam Time Table 2026 contains all important information for students. The key details mentioned in the timetable are:

items: Examination dates and day
Subject name and paper
Time duration of each exam
Maximum marks
Paper codes
Important instructions and notes for candidates.
